title: LLM-Mediated Task Creation
one_liner: Let humans describe intent; let the LLM turn intent into a reviewable task.
problem: If every task has to be hand-written as a perfect prompt, the human becomes the system's input API.
solution: The human sketches; an LLM drafts the actual task with title, scope, non-goals, risks, acceptance. The human reviews intent, not grammar.
